about.title: About Xorazm Tour
about.subtitle: Your gateway to the wonders of ancient Khorezm
about.mission_text: We are dedicated to unveiling the rich historical heritage of the Khorezm region to travelers from around the world. Our team of local experts crafts immersive experiences that connect you with centuries-old traditions, stunning architecture, and the warm hospitality of Uzbekistan.
about.why_local_text: Born and raised in Khorezm, our guides offer authentic insights into the region's history, culture, and hidden gems that only locals know.
about.why_curated_text: Every tour is meticulously planned to balance historical exploration, cultural immersion, and comfortable travel.
about.why_heritage_text: We are committed to sustainable tourism that supports local communities and preserves the region's UNESCO World Heritage sites.
